title: stevia mcvaughii
intro: Stevia mcvaughii, also known as Stevia eupatoria or Stevia ovata, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico. It belongs to the genus Stevia and is a plant-based sweetener alternative to sugar and artificial sweeteners, with medicinal properties attributed to its leaves, which contain steviol glycosides. The medicinal properties of Stevia mcvaughii include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving digestion. Stevia mcvaughii can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also available as a dietary supplement in capsule or powder form.
